aboutMe.paragraph1: I’m a Computer Science student (Class of 2025) focused on Data Science, analytics, and building meaningful insights from real-world data. My work blends Python, SQL, visualization, and structured thinking not just to build models, but to understand patterns, ask better questions, and communicate decisions clearly.
aboutMe.paragraph2: Rather than chasing tools, I focus on mastering fundamentals data understanding, analytical thinking, and practical problem solving.
aboutMe.highlightBox: Driven to contribute in data-driven and problem-solving roles from analytics and machine learning to scalable software systems.

projects.title: Ecommerce-Customer-Behavior-Analysis
projects.description: This project is a Power BI dashboard designed to analyze customer behavior in an e-commerce setting.

projects.title: InventorySync: A Smart Dashboard for Warehouse Efficiency
projects.description: InventorySync is a smart dashboard that cleans, analyzes, and predicts warehouse data to improve inventory efficiency and demand forecasting.

research.title: Optimizing Supply Chain Logistics in Manufacturing to Increase Warehouse Efficiency Through Storage Optimization
research.description: This research focuses on optimizing supply chain logistics in manufacturing by improving warehouse efficiency through effective storage optimization.

books.title: The Craft of Research
books.description: 5th edition by by Wayne C. Booth (Author), Gregory G. Colomb (Author), Joseph M. Williams (Author), Joseph Bizup (Author), William T. FitzGerald (Author)  [Published by University of Chicago Press and ISBN 9780226826677], I will soon provide full discription after completing the book
